description: A module to export data from GenePattern in MAGE-TAB format
author: Marc-Danie Nazaire(Broad Institute)
plan:
## ConvertToMAGETAB GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ConvertToMAGETAB is a GenePattern module that A module to export data from GenePattern in MAGE-TAB format

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 6 parameters:
- Required: input.file, sample.reference.label, feature.reference.label, intensity.type.label, output.prefix
- Optional: cls.file

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>limpopo-1.0-beta-20100420.jar<path.separator><libdir>convertMAGETAB.jar org.broadinstitute.mage.MAGETABCreator <input.file> <sample.reference.label> <feature.reference.label> <intensity.type.label> <output.prefix> <cls.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: sample.reference.label
parameters.description: reference label for samples in the data matrix file

parameters.name: feature.reference.label
parameters.description: reference label for features in the data matrix file

parameters.name: intensity.type.label
parameters.description: label that specifies the type of intensity values in data matrix file

parameters.name: output.prefix
parameters.description: prefix to use for output file name
